title: Embodied AI Project Dashboard
subtitle: World models, self-improving simulators, teleop acceleration, and robotics + 3D printing

summary.focus: Frame the whole portfolio as one loop: real-robot infra collects and validates data; UMI / layered / HOI projects structure it; simulator and PoD projects turn it into robot tasks, evaluation, and physical outputs.
summary.progress: ARX infra is ready; Gello-controlled dual Franka + Wuji Hand is complete as a one-DoF gripper path; the first Wuji + Franka cutting demo is now scoped to simulated meat made from slime clay and a toy knife before any sharp blade; UMI Wan2.2-TI2V-5B LoRA v0 has trained to step-125 on 003 / 8xL40S and is waiting for held-out quality evaluation; drag-demo fine-tuning is now running on a replay-cleaned 90-episode dataset with four ablations.
summary.blockers: MANUS + VIVE / wrist tracking hardware completion; supervised Wuji + Franka slime-clay toy-knife demo staging and fixture evidence; FACTR / force-feedback procurement through Jingte; UMI post-train held-out gallery is pending because the binding machine has been intermittently offline; any Wan2.2 A14B / 14B scale-up needs a separate 8xA100/H100 80GB-class compute ask rather than 8xL30; drag-demo results are pending for the four raw/gray-hand and split/all-data ablations; ArtiCraft3D asset generation still needs a local adapter smoke before it can be counted as part of AgenticSim.
summary.next: Stage the Wuji + Franka toy-knife slime-clay cutting demo with strict safety gates, finish the UMI step-125 held-out GT/base/LoRA gallery on the binding machine, prepare the teacher compute ask for any Wan2.2 A14B / 14B scale-up, test ArtiCraft3D as an agentic articulated-asset expansion route for Self-improving, route FACTR procurement through Jingte, install the 10T HDD from ME as group NAS, wait for the four drag-demo ablation results, and then test a raw-data plus clean-replay mixture if useful.

storyline.summary: How real-robot infra, human demonstrations, video world models, simulators, and physical outputs form one loop.

nodes.title: Real-Robot Data Infra
nodes.body: ARX, UMI, Cobot Magic, Linker hands, gloves, VIVE Tracker, and Franka + Wuji provide the hardware base for collection, calibration, and validation.

nodes.title: Video + HOI World Modeling
nodes.body: UMI wrist views, layered third-person videos, same-task HOI data, and rate-curve teleop research turn human operation into structured video, inferred action, and state data.

nodes.title: Self-Improving Sim + Physical Products
nodes.body: Agentic Real2Sim2Real-VLA evaluation, generated assets, household tasks, simulator rollouts, robot evaluation, and language / image-to-CAD design close the loop back into real-world experiments.

flows.title: How generated videos become robot data, not only visual prediction

nodes.title: UMI Data via Teleop Video Model
nodes.body: Wrist-view UMI data can be generated directly from teleoperation trajectories: action, gripper state, and dual eye-in-hand views condition the video world model.

nodes.title: Layered Video World Model
nodes.body: Third-person videos are split into persistent scene, object/contact, and robot/ego dynamics. The IDM story is the LfD / LfO bridge: offline it recovers missing actions from visual state transitions; real-time it becomes vision-based teleoperation or shared control.

nodes.title: Agentic R2S2R to Dual-Simulator Data
nodes.body: Large volumes of generated video data become dual-simulator Robot Data through object physics assets, panoramic scene reconstruction, digital-twin robot rollouts, and agentic Real2Sim2Real-VLA evaluation traces.

visual_references.caption: Real-robot infra: ARX, Franka + Wuji Hand, UMI, Linker Hand, gloves, and VIVE Tracker.
EgoVTLA pillars: perception alignment and intuition alignment.
World-model-driven EgoVTLA: vision -> depth / flow -> action.
Layered world model: persistent scene, object/contact, and robot/ego dynamics.
PEARL-style loop: memory, attribution, co-evolution, governance.

visual_references.alt: Robotics and 3D printing product design platform
visual_references.caption: Robotics + 3D printing: generated structure exported toward printable parts, printer-farm takeout, and assembly.

visual_references.alt: Drag-teaching robot data video editing and hand removal
visual_references.caption: Drag-demo editing: ARX egg-cracking data, Kling hand removal, and diff-map QA.

visual_references.alt: HOI diverse dataset with ego camera, hand pose, and depth
visual_references.caption: Diverse same-task HOI data: ego RGB, hand pose, and z16 depth.

rules: dashboard/index.html is a rendered shell; dashboard/state/*.json is the source of truth for project and task content.
Dashboard updates stay limited to project summaries, risks, decisions, and task/TODO state.
Runtime control-plane state belongs outside this repository.
